input: Analyze performance for our e-commerce checkout service
expected_behavior: Produces S1 Performance Baseline with latency distribution (p50/p90/p95/p99), throughput metrics, resource utilization breakdown, bottleneck classification, and dependency chain analysis.

input: Design load tests for a microservices API gateway handling 10K rps
expected_behavior: Delivers S2 Load Testing Strategy with tool recommendation (k6 for CI-native), all 5 test types (baseline/ramp/stress/spike/soak), CI/CD gating with p95 regression threshold, and synthetic monitoring plan.

input: Plan capacity for a service growing 20% month-over-month
expected_behavior: Produces S3 Capacity Planning with USL-based model, scaling trigger thresholds, capacity runway calculation, horizontal vs vertical scaling recommendation, and cost per transaction at scale points.

input: Optimize caching for a content platform with 90% read traffic
expected_behavior: Delivers S4 Caching Architecture with multi-layer design (browser/CDN/app/DB), cache-aside strategy recommendation, invalidation strategy comparison, cache key design pattern, hit ratio targets (>90% static, >70% dynamic), and thundering herd protection.

input: Define SLOs for a fintech payment processing service
expected_behavior: Produces S6 SLA/SLO Design with percentile-based targets per service tier, error budget calculation, multi-window burn rate alerts (fast-burn page + slow-burn ticket), and budget exhaustion policy (feature freeze).
